## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / refactor / tooling

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? List the commands or steps. -->

- [ ] `ruff check app tests scripts` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check app tests scripts` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes
- [ ] Manually tested (describe how)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if this is a user-visible change
- [ ] Added or updated translation keys in both `app/i18n/de.json` and `app/i18n/en.json` if UI strings changed
- [ ] Added tests for new functionality
